featureSections.title: Full-Service Electrical Contractors in Dallas

featureSections.title: 24/7 Emergency Electrical Repair
featureSections.body: Electrical emergencies don't wait. Our team is on call around the clock to handle power outages, sparking outlets, and other urgent issues. Fast response, expert diagnosis, and lasting repairs.
bullets: No extra charge for after-hours calls
featureSections.cardBody: We prioritize emergencies to restore your power and safety as quickly as possible.

servicesPage.intro: At TX Dallas Electrics, we provide a comprehensive range of electrical services tailored to meet the needs of Dallas homeowners and businesses. Our licensed electricians combine technical expertise with exceptional customer service to deliver results that last.

services.title: Residential Wiring & Rewiring
services.shortDescription: Safe and code-compliant wiring for new construction, renovations, or outdated systems.
services.longDescription: Whether you're building a new home or upgrading an older property, our team handles all wiring projects with precision. We assess your current system, recommend improvements, and execute the work efficiently, ensuring full compliance with local codes.
benefits: Enhanced safety and reduced fire risk
Increased home value and energy efficiency
Custom solutions for any room or addition
Clean, tidy work areas with minimal disruption

process.title: Inspection & Consultation
process.description: We visit your property to evaluate existing wiring and discuss your needs, budget, and timeline.

process.title: Custom Plan & Estimate
process.description: Our team designs a detailed plan with a transparent quote, outlining all materials and labor costs.

process.title: Professional Installation
process.description: Licensed electricians complete the wiring safely and efficiently, followed by thorough testing and cleanup.

faqs.question: How do I know if my home needs rewiring?
faqs.answer: Signs include frequent breaker trips, flickering lights, discolored outlets, or a home over 40 years old. We offer free inspections to assess your system.

faqs.question: How long does a full rewiring take?
faqs.answer: Depending on home size, it typically takes 3-7 days. We minimize disruption and keep you informed throughout.

services.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Modernize your electrical panel to handle today's power demands safely.
services.longDescription: Older panels can't support modern appliances and electronics, leading to frequent tripping or hazards. We upgrade to high-capacity panels that improve safety, prevent overloads, and support future additions like EV chargers or solar.
benefits: Increases property value and insurance savings

process.title: Load Calculation
process.description: We calculate your current and future power needs to recommend the right panel size.

process.title: Permit & Planning
process.description: We handle all permits and coordinate with your utility company for a smooth upgrade.

process.title: Installation & Testing
process.description: Our electricians install the new panel, connect circuits, and test everything for optimal performance.

faqs.question: When should I upgrade my electrical panel?
faqs.answer: If you have an old fuse box, a 60-amp panel, or frequently trip breakers, it's time for an upgrade. Also consider upgrading before major renovations.

faqs.question: Will an upgrade increase my electric bill?
faqs.answer: No, an upgrade itself doesn't increase usage. In fact, modern panels can improve efficiency and reduce energy waste.

services.title: Lighting Installation & Design
services.shortDescription: Beautiful, energy-efficient lighting solutions for indoor and outdoor spaces.
services.longDescription: Transform your property with custom lighting that enhances ambiance, security, and energy savings. We install recessed, pendant, chandelier, landscape, and smart lighting systems, tailored to your style and needs.
benefits: Lower energy bills with LED and smart controls
Custom designs to match your aesthetic

process.title: Design Consultation
process.description: We discuss your vision, review the space, and recommend fixtures and layouts that fit your budget.

process.title: Fixture Selection & Sourcing
process.description: We help you choose quality fixtures and handle ordering to ensure timely delivery.

process.title: Professional Installation
process.description: Our team installs all wiring, mounts, and controls, then tests every light for perfect operation.

faqs.question: Can you install smart lighting systems?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We specialize in smart home integration, including dimmers, motion sensors, and app-controlled systems.

faqs.question: Do you offer landscape lighting?
faqs.answer: Yes, we design and install landscape lighting to highlight pathways, gardens, and architectural features.

services.title: Emergency Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: 24/7 rapid response for urgent electrical issues in Dallas.
services.longDescription: Electrical emergencies can happen anytime. Our team is on standby 24/7 to address power outages, exposed wires, sparking outlets, and other hazards. We prioritize safety and work quickly to restore your power and peace of mind.

process.title: Emergency Call
process.description: Call our 24/7 line; a dispatcher will ask about the issue and send the nearest available electrician.

process.title: On-Site Assessment
process.description: Our technician arrives promptly, assesses the danger, and explains the problem and solution.

process.title: Immediate Repair
process.description: We fix the issue safely, ensuring your system is stable and secure before we leave.

faqs.question: What qualifies as an electrical emergency?
faqs.answer: Any situation that poses a safety risk: sparking outlets, burning smells, power outages affecting only your home, or exposed wires.

faqs.question: Do you charge extra for after-hours calls?
faqs.answer: No. We believe emergencies shouldn't cost extra, so our rates are the same 24/7.

about.headline: Dallas's Go-To Electricians Since 2008
about.mission: To provide safe, reliable, and affordable electrical services that exceed customer expectations, while building lasting relationships in our community.
story: TX Dallas Electrics was founded by master electrician John Martinez after years of seeing homeowners and small businesses struggle to find trustworthy electricians. Starting with a single truck and a commitment to quality, John built a team of like-minded professionals who share his passion for craftsmanship and customer service. Today, we serve hundreds of clients across Dallas, from historic homes in M Streets to modern offices in the Design District.

Our growth has been driven by word-of-mouth and a simple philosophy: treat every home like our own. We invest in ongoing training, top-tier tools, and rigorous safety protocols. Whether it's a small repair or a large-scale installation, our team approaches every job with the same dedication to excellence. We're proud to be a local business that gives back and supports our neighbors.

coreValues.title: Safety First
coreValues.description: We never compromise on safety. Every job follows strict protocols to protect you, your property, and our team.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest communication, transparent pricing, and ethical work practices are the foundation of our business.

coreValues.title: Excellence
coreValues.description: We take pride in our work and continuously improve our skills to deliver the highest quality results.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: As a Dallas-based company, we are committed to supporting local causes and building a stronger community.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with TX Dallas Electrics
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your project or need emergency help? Call us or fill out the form below, and we'll respond within 30 minutes.
